phrases.intent_en: Where is the Nakasu Kawabata walkway?
phrases.text_local: なかす かわばたの さんぽみちは どこですか？
phrases.cultural_note: Kawabata refers to the riverside area. Locals often guide by visible landmarks like bridges or lit-up areas.

likely_response.local: かわの むこうがわ、 あの あかりの あたりです。
likely_response.translation_en: On the other side of the river, around those lights.

responses.english: On the other side of the river, around those lights.
responses.french: かわの むこうがわ、 あの あかりの あたりです。

phrases.intent_en: How do yatai stalls accept payment?
phrases.text_local: やたいでは どうやって しはらいますか？
phrases.cultural_note: Yatai stalls are almost exclusively cash-based. Payment is typically settled directly with the master after the meal.

likely_response.local: げんきんで たべおわりに はらってね。
likely_response.translation_en: Pay with cash when you finish eating.

responses.english: Pay with cash when you finish eating.
responses.french: げんきんで たべおわりに はらってね。

phrases.intent_en: Is there a taxi stand at night?
phrases.text_local: よる、タクシーのりばは ありますか？
phrases.cultural_note: Taxis don't queue inside the narrow entertainment alleys. They line up on the wider perimeter roads.

likely_response.local: ええ、あの おおどおりに でれば いますよ。
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, if you go out to that main street, they're there.

responses.english: Yes, if you go out to that main street, they're there.
responses.french: ええ、あの おおどおりに でれば いますよ。

phrases.intent_en: Where is the nearest yatai food stall?
phrases.text_local: いちばん ちかい やたいは どこですか？
phrases.cultural_note: In Nakasu, yatai stalls cluster along the Naka River, especially on the south side. Pointing is common.

likely_response.local: かわぞいに ずらっと ならんでますよ。
likely_response.translation_en: They're all lined up along the river.

responses.english: They're all lined up along the river.
responses.french: かわぞいに ずらっと ならんでますよ。
